problem: What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown
hypothesis: If Thermoelectric Seebeck coefficient maximization is applied to universe, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
